scenes.heading: EXT. ABANDONED MANOR - NIGHT
scenes.action: A brave paranormal investigator, ARIA, stands before a decaying 1800s manor, gripping her equipment as thunder rumbles in the distance.

dialogue.speaker: EMILIA
dialogue.line: Alright... just another case. In and out.

scenes.visual_cues: Dilapidated Victorian mansion, overgrown vines, flickering lightning illuminating broken windows, heavy fog.

scenes.heading: INT. MANOR HALLWAY - NIGHT
scenes.action: ARIA walks cautiously through a dark hallway as doors creak open on their own. A faint, ghostly figure begins to form at the end of the corridor.

dialogue.speaker: ELIZABETH
dialogue.line: You should not have come back... child.

scenes.visual_cues: Long shadowy corridor, flickering lantern light, peeling wallpaper, cold mist forming a humanoid silhouette.

scenes.heading: INT. MANOR GRAND ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.action: The ghost fully manifests, revealing a resemblance to ARIA. She slowly realizes the truth as old portraits on the wall confirm their connection.

dialogue.speaker: EMILIA
dialogue.line: Wait... I know that face. You're... you're part of my family.

dialogue.speaker: ELIZABETH
dialogue.line: I have waited generations for you to return.

scenes.visual_cues: Dust-covered grand hall, antique portraits, one resembling ARIA, glowing ghost figure, faint candlelight casting long shadows.

characters.name: ARIA
characters.appearance: Aria stands with a brave demeanor, gripping her equipment tightly.

characters.name: EMILIA
characters.appearance: Emilia has a cautious look on her face as she walks through the dark hallway.

characters.name: ELIZABETH
characters.appearance: Elizabeth is a ghostly figure with a resemblance to Aria, dressed in old attire.
